LineComment.Text: Comment/Function: Alarm management block for the machine, organized by severity
Each level triggers specific actions. Alarms are grouped by
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
blinking blue light and red beacon + user acknowledge
blinking blue light and red beacon + stop program at next step + user acknowledge
OR "LBP_AlarmMsgs".UserA[03].A70UUxx[29] WFA Msg défaut BW Loader, pas d'acquit nécéssaire
blinking blue light and red beacon + stop program at next step + acknowledge by reset button
blinking blue light and red beacon + acknowledge by reset button + power off
OR "LBP_AlarmMsgs".UserA[06].A70UUxx[02] WFA 20251118 - A revoir temp min axe
